medialive.channel.inputspecification.Cfn:
The input specification for this channel. It specifies the key characteristics of the inputs for this channel: the maximum bitrate, the resolution, and the codec. 

This entity is at the top level in the channel.

medialive.channel.inputspecification.Cod.Description: The codec to include in the input specification for this channel.

medialive.channel.inputspecification.Max.Description: The maximum input bitrate for any input attached to this channel.

medialive.channel.inputspecification.Res.Description: The resolution for any input attached to this channel.
